title: Hello sunshine... work hard and be kind
excerpt: The latest tees were just revealed for Fresh Squeezed Fashion ! Remember you only have until the 14th to order and then these tees are gone. The super talented and sweet Valerie from Lily & Val did the art for…
body:
The latest tees were just revealed for Fresh Squeezed Fashion!

Remember you only have until the 14th to order and then these tees are gone. The super talented and sweet Valerie from Lily & Val did the art for Work hard & be kind and we are huge fans. Also subscribers (it's a month-to-month subscription that you can cancel anytime) can add an exclusive enamel pin to the order with no additional shipping. Which tee would you choose or are you like me and need both?
